title: Docs preview server failed to start: Server process exited with code 1
rationale: Next.js subprocess failing to start is an environment issue (port conflict, missing deps, etc.), not a Fern bug. Reclassified from InternalError to EnvironmentError.
fixSummary: Change failAndThrow code from InternalError to EnvironmentError in runAppPreviewServer.ts.
problemSignature: startNextJsServer failure classified as InternalError instead of EnvironmentError.
